'''Teloc Ol-sen''' was a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Teloc Ol-sen system/Legends|Teloc Ol-sen system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] that was inhabited by the [[Teloc Hunters]].<ref name="C" /> At some point before [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the vigilante group known as the [[Zulirian Swordmasters]] fought and massacred a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell on Teloc Ol-sen. Members of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] later wrote a report on this event.<ref name="A">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>
